mapper.select:
(SELECT id, user_id as userId, blood_sugar as bloodSugar, meal_status as mealStatus, record_date as recordDate FROM health_data_bs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND meal_status = 0 ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT id, user_id as userId, blood_sugar as bloodSugar, meal_status as mealStatus, record_date as recordDate FROM health_data_bs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND meal_status = 1 ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT 1)
